texto: I started to crawl off; then I remembered my leftover pizza, and I peeled off the salami, pepperoni, and anchovies and placed them on the CD tray (whicn no one used these days with flash drives around)on Boone's computer. I hit the close button and watched the smelly part of my delicious dinner slide away. Boone would have a great time wondering 'where's that smell coming from?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Duffy Brown que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I started to crawl off; then I remembered my leftover pizza, and I peeled off the salami, peppero…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, anchovies, comedy, com foco em comedy e funny.

I hit the close button and watched the smelly part of my delicious dinner slide away. Boone would have a great time wondering 'where's that smell coming from?

texto: from Pearls and Poison… “In two minutes the cops are going to come barreling though that door,” I whispered to Auntie KiKi hoping to get her mind off the body in the back room. “Any suggestions how we tell these workers out here their candidate just croaked?” “Yell The jackass bit the big one, hip-hip hooray Gloria wins, then run like the dickens before someone recognizes us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Duffy Brown: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “from Pearls and Poison… “In two minutes the cops are going to come barreling though that door,” I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, auntie, cozy-mystery pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e cozy-mystery.
